subcodes.first_line: Immeasurable praise beseemeth the peerless and incomparable One, Who hath illumined the dawning-places of devoted hearts with the rays of the Sun of Divine Unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ستایش بیقیاس یکتای بیهمتائیرا سزاوار که مشارق قلوب مقبله را بانوار شمس توحید
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for opponents; enemies of the Faith, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @prayer for teaching, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action
